author: adrianlyjak
description: Speak text from your notes. Converts text to speech in real-time using lifelike voices from OpenAI.

manifest.description: Highlight and speak text from your notes. Converts text to speech in real-time with lifelike voices.

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 0.15.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Other Changes
* Add PCM response format for OpenAI-compatible TTS by @pajaroamarillo in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/144
* feat: add MiniMax speech 2.8 models by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/148
* Add Ko-fi funding link by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/149
* Add Fish Audio TTS provider by @RONNYKHALIL in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/142
* Add generation speed setting for OpenAI-compatible TTS by @pajaroamarillo in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/143

## New Contributors
* @pajaroamarillo made their first contribution in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/144
* @RONNYKHALIL made their first contribution in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/142

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/compare/0.14.5...0.15.0

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/compare/0.9.4...0.10.0

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* update CONTRIBUTING.md with installation instructions
* Fix #57, moving more of the audio state into the audio elements buffer for seamless OS level interactions and improved playback quality

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix #49 redo settings interface and expose "custom" by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/50
* Switch from Web Audio to Html Audio by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/51
* Make playback rate more configurable by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/52
* Add menu options to export audio files by @adrianlyjak in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/54


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/compare/0.4.1...0.5.0

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description: Fix bug where right click menu item, when clicked with no selection, plays only the single word where the cursor is placed. Now plays to the end of the document from the cursor position instead

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Improvements to player command ergonomics
  * consolidate play and resume commands into a toggle so they can be bound with a single key
  * Play current file selection with pause/resume command if there's no active audio
  * Do not require a selection for playing audio with the 'Play selection' command
* strip bibtex citation and criticmarkup comments

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix #22: Add indexeddb based device local audio cache in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/31, https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/35
  * Add cache duration configuration to increase or decrease cache usage as needed
  * Add setting to purge the ca
  * Can revert to using vault based `.tts` cache in settings
* Fix #1: Add player visibility mode, defaulting to always on for mobile in https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/pull/32

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/adrianlyjak/obsidian-aloud-tts/compare/0.2.1...0.3.0

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description: debugging issues with cursor/player selection on mobile

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description: Adds better handling and more visible error information (Fix for #26)

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description:
- #5 Add better support for editing text while audio is actively speaking. Text highlights now update for changed text, and plugin will read process updated text
- #12 strip markdown before processing audio so that text is more suited to speaking
- #15 Add support for custom OpenAI compatible server

releases.author: adrianlyjak
releases.description: Testing build of better text editing support
releases.name: 0.2.0-rc2

releases.description:
- Clean markdown before sending to TTS
- Add support for custom openai compatible API server
releases.name: 0.2.0-rc1

releases.description: - Adds playback speed controls (#10)
